<final_evaluation>
{
    "Q1": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "5, ['Requesting the user’s current HealthFirst Premium policy number (personal data not in template)', 'Offering a Premium Insurance Membership with 15% discount across all policies (membership/discount not represented)', 'Offering Home Maintenance Program including inspections and repairs (not an insurance coverage type)', 'Offering Insurance Portfolio Management service for family coverage optimization (financial management service not in template)', 'Requesting to coordinate with current provider by syncing claims history (cross-provider data operation not representable)']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "14, ['Providing detailed health insurance plan options with monthly costs and coverage tiers (maps to insurance_plans and health_insurance_specific)', 'Providing property insurance plan with coverage details and deductible (maps to property_insurance_specific)', 'Providing travel insurance options with global coverage, trip cancellation, and medical evacuation (maps to travel_insurance_specific)', 'Including add-ons like preventive care package or technology protection (maps partially to specialized_coverage)', 'Specifying coverage duration as permanent (maps to insurance_plans.coverage_duration)', 'Specifying global and family coverage (maps to insurance_plans.global_coverage and family_coverage_included)', 'Including telemedicine, gym reimbursement, stress management, and crisis intervention (maps to health_insurance_specific)', 'Mentioning 24/7 emergency coordination and multilingual support (maps to service_features and travel_insurance_specific)', 'Providing total monthly cost, setup fee, and annual savings (maps to cost_analysis)', 'Requesting confirmation to include transition coordination step (maps to scheduling_information.transition_coordination_needed)', 'Providing activation date and binding confirmation details (maps to policy_timeline and confirmation_status)', 'Providing delivery method as digital/email (maps to documentation_status.delivery_method)', 'Providing coverage for physical, mental, property, and travel plans under one family plan (maps to insurance_plans.plan_type and family_coverage)', 'Stating readiness for final binding confirmation and policy issuance (maps to confirmation_status and documentation_status)']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 5, ['Requesting the user’s current HealthFirst Premium policy number (personal data not in template)', 'Offering a Premium Insurance Membership with 15% discount across all policies (membership/discount not represented)', 'Offering Home Maintenance Program including inspections and repairs (not an insurance coverage type)', 'Offering Insurance Portfolio Management service for family coverage optimization (financial management service not in template)', 'Requesting to coordinate with current provider by syncing claims history (cross-provider data operation not representable)']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
Q2.A: 14, ['Providing detailed health insurance plan options with monthly costs and coverage tiers (maps to insurance_plans and health_insurance_specific)', 'Providing property insurance plan with coverage details and deductible (maps to property_insurance_specific)', 'Providing travel insurance options with global coverage, trip cancellation, and medical evacuation (maps to travel_insurance_specific)', 'Including add-ons like preventive care package or technology protection (maps partially to specialized_coverage)', 'Specifying coverage duration as permanent (maps to insurance_plans.coverage_duration)', 'Specifying global and family coverage (maps to insurance_plans.global_coverage and family_coverage_included)', 'Including telemedicine, gym reimbursement, stress management, and crisis intervention (maps to health_insurance_specific)', 'Mentioning 24/7 emergency coordination and multilingual support (maps to service_features and travel_insurance_specific)', 'Providing total monthly cost, setup fee, and annual savings (maps to cost_analysis)', 'Requesting confirmation to include transition coordination step (maps to scheduling_information.transition_coordination_needed)', 'Providing activation date and binding confirmation details (maps to policy_timeline and confirmation_status)', 'Providing delivery method as digital/email (maps to documentation_status.delivery_method)', 'Providing coverage for physical, mental, property, and travel plans under one family plan (maps to insurance_plans.plan_type and family_coverage)', 'Stating readiness for final binding confirmation and policy issuance (maps to confirmation_status and documentation_status)']
